requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3与危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3與危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium-ion cells and batteries shipped to Bosnia and Herzegovina normally need UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 transport test evidence and the related test summary before air, sea, road, or multimodal transport. Transport compliance is separate from Bosnia product conformity, BAS evidence, DERK/NOS BiH project approval, and grid interconnection.
summary.zh: 运往波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的锂离子电芯和电池通常需要《联合国试验和标准手册》第III部分第38.3小节运输测试证据及相关测试概要，方可进行航空、海运、公路或多式联运。运输合规与波斯尼亚产品符合性、BAS证据、DERK/NOS BiH项目批准和并网相互独立。
summary.zht: 運往波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那的鋰離子電芯和電池通常需要《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第III部分第38.3小節運輸測試證據及相關測試概要，方可進行航空、海運、公路或多式聯運。運輸合規與波斯尼亞產品符合性、BAS證據、DERK/NOS BiH專案批准和併網相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
UN Model Regulations dangerous-goods framework for lithium batteries

summary.en: Chinese exporters often hold UN 38.3 reports and transport-condition identification documents issued for outbound lithium-battery shipments. These documents can support Bosnia-bound shipment planning, but shippers must still match the exact cell, battery, module, state of charge, packaging, dangerous-goods declaration, and route rules for the actual transport corridor.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有用于锂电池出口运输的UN 38.3报告及运输条件文件。这些文件可支持运往波斯尼亚的运输安排，但托运人仍须确保实际路线下的电芯、电池、模组、荷电状态、包装、危险货物申报及运输方式规则逐项匹配。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有用於鋰電池出口運輸的UN 38.3報告及運輸條件文件。這些文件可支持運往波斯尼亞的運輸安排，但託運人仍須確保實際路線下的電芯、電池、模組、荷電狀態、包裝、危險貨物申報及運輸方式規則逐項匹配。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and lithium-battery test summary
China outbound dangerous-goods transport documentation for lithium batteries

gap.en: A transport safety file does not substitute product compliance. Exporters should prepare model-specific UN 38.3 reports, test summaries, SDS, packing instructions, battery net mass information, state-of-charge controls, and carrier-required declarations for the selected Bosnia route.
gap.zh: 运输安全文件不能替代产品合规。出口商应为发往波斯尼亚的具体路线准备型号对应的UN 38.3报告、测试概要、SDS、包装说明、电池净重信息、荷电状态控制及承运人要求的申报文件。
gap.zht: 運輸安全文件不能取代產品合規。出口商應為發往波斯尼亞的具體路線準備型號對應的UN 38.3報告、測試概要、SDS、包裝說明、电池淨重資訊、荷電狀態控制及承運人要求的申報文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated lithium-battery transport where UN dangerous-goods rules are incorporated by the selected mode and route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for regulated outbound lithium-battery transport documentation; not a substitute for destination product or grid approval

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a transport gate, not Bosnia market access. Match test summaries and dangerous-goods package to the exact shipped battery configuration and chosen route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输门槛，不是波斯尼亚市场准入批准。应将运输测试概要和危险货物包装与实际发运电池配置和路线逐项匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸門檻，不是波斯尼亞市場准入批准。應將運輸測試概要和危險貨物包裝與實際發運電池配置和路線逐項匹配。
